items.headline: भारत की मेघना सज्जनार ने एशियन शूटिंग चैंपियनशिप में जीता ब्रॉन्ज़ मेडल

summaryParagraphs: अब इस लाइव ब्लॉग को रोकने का वक़्त आ गया है. बीबीसी संवाददाता चंदन कुमार जजवाड़े को दीजिए इजाज़त. कल एक नए लाइव ब्लॉग के साथ फिर हाज़िर होंगे. बीबीसी हिन्दी पर मौजूद कुछ अहम ख़बरों को पढ़ने के लिए आप उनके साथ लगे लिंक पर क्लिक कर सकते हैं. - रूसी तेल पर पीयूष गोयल ने नहीं दिया कोई जवाब, जानें कौन से अमेरिकी उत्पादों पर टैरिफ़ हटा देगा भारत - पटना में गर्ल्स हॉस्टल के हालात : 'दिल्ली महंगा था, लेकिन यहां तो जान पर ही ख़तरा है' - मध्य प्रदेश: मधुमक्खियों से 25 बच्चों को बचाने के लिए अपनी जान गंवाने वाली कंचन बाई - 'हम सर कटाने को तैयार', राजस्थान में खेजड़ी के पेड़ काटे जाने के ख़िलाफ़ धरना For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. items.headline: 4 Indian students injured in knife attack at Russian medical college hostel
whyItMatters: UPDATED: Feb 8, 2026 00:15 IST Several persons, including four Indian students, were injured in a stabbing attack on Saturday at a sports hall inside a foreign students’ hostel at a university i
summaryParagraphs: UPDATED: Feb 8, 2026 00:15 IST Several persons, including four Indian students, were injured in a stabbing attack on Saturday at a sports hall inside a foreign students’ hostel at a university in Russia’s Bashkortostan Republic, local media reported. Two police officers were also injured while attempting to intervene, according to preliminary information. The incident occurred at the dormitory of the State Medical University in Ufa, the capital city of Bashkortostan. The Interior Ministry said initial reports indicate that a teenager armed with a knife entered the medical university dormitory and attacked students residing there, stabbing several individuals. “The attacker resisted arrest, during which two police officers were stabbed. Furthermore, the suspect also inflicted bodily harm on himself,” Interior Ministry spokesperson Maj Gen Irina Volk told the RTVI.com web portal. Authorities said the suspect was detained following the attack. The extent of injurie For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Islamic State affiliate claims Islamabad mosque attack that killed over 50
whyItMatters: New Delhi , UPDATED: Feb 7, 2026 23:31 IST Written By: Mayukh Debnath An affiliate of the terrorist group Islamic State has claimed responsibility for the suicide bombing that claimed the lives of at
summaryParagraphs: New Delhi , UPDATED: Feb 7, 2026 23:31 IST Written By: Mayukh Debnath An affiliate of the terrorist group Islamic State has claimed responsibility for the suicide bombing that claimed the lives of at least 50 people at a Shi'ite mosque in Pakistan's Islamabad on Friday. This came as four suspects, including an alleged mastermind, were arrested in connection with the attack. The explosion that took place at the Khadija Tul Kubra Imambargah also left more than 100 people injured . Pakistani authorities have identified the suicide bomber as 32-year-old Yasir, who hailed from Peshawar in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. While claiming responsibility for the blast in a statement released via its Amaq News Agency, the Islamic State in Pakistan confirmed that the security team at the site tried to stop its bomber . The perpetrator, subsequently, opened fire at the security guards and exploded near the worshippers inside the mosque, according to the terrorist group's communique. It justified the attack, as For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: 'We could've batted better': SKY makes honest admission after USA win
whyItMatters: India start their T20 World Cup with a 29-run win over the USA, recovering from 77/6 thanks to captain Suryakumar Yadav’s unbeaten 84 off 49 balls. SKY admitted, "We could've batted a little better,"
summaryParagraphs: India start their T20 World Cup with a 29-run win over the USA, recovering from 77/6 thanks to captain Suryakumar Yadav’s unbeaten 84 off 49 balls. SKY admitted, "We could've batted a little better," praising his Mumbai experience and coach Gautam Gambhir’s advice. Bowlers Siraj, Arshdeep, and Axar restricted the USA to 132/8, securing a hard-fought victory. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India. items.headline: टी-20 वर्ल्ड कप: अमेरिका के खिलाफ भारत की जीत में कप्तान सूर्यकुमार यादव और गेंदबाज चमके
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, Getty Images टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 में भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम ने अपने सफर का आगाज जीत के साथ किया है. मुंबई के वानखेड़े स्टेडियम में खेले गए अपने पहले मुकाबले में भारत ने अमेरिका को 29 रन से मात
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, Getty Images टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 में भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम ने अपने सफर का आगाज जीत के साथ किया है. मुंबई के वानखेड़े स्टेडियम में खेले गए अपने पहले मुकाबले में भारत ने अमेरिका को 29 रन से मात दी. भारत की जीत के हीरो कप्तान सूर्यकुमार यादव रहे जिन्होंने 84 रन की तूफानी पारी खेली. इसके साथ ही मोहम्मद सिराज ने तीन, जबकि अर्शदीप सिंह और अक्षर पटेल ने 2-2 विकेट लेकर भारत की जीत में अहम भूमिका निभाई. कप्तान सूर्यकुमार यादव को उनकी इस पारी के लिए प्लेयर ऑफ द मैच भी चुना गया. भारत ने पहले बल्लेबाजी करते अमेरिका के सामने जीत के लिए 20 ओवर में 162 रन का लक्ष्य रखा है. लेकिन अमेरिका की टीम 20 ओवर में आठ विकेट गंवाकर 132 रन ही बना पाई. हालांकि अमेरिका के तेज गेंदबाज शैडली वैन शाल्कविक ने चार ओवर में 25 रन खर्च कर चार विकेट लिए थे और उन्होंने भारत को बड़ा स्कोर बनाने से रोकने की पूरी कोशिश की. इमेज स्रोत, Getty Images इससे पहले आईसीसी टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 के तीसरे मुकाबले में अमेरिका ने टॉस जीतकर पहले गेंदबाजी का फैसला किया. हालांकि भारत की शुरुआत खराब रही और अभिषेक शर्मा बिना खाता खोले पहल For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Saboteurs damage rail lines in north Italy, disrupt travel as Winter Olympics open
whyItMatters: Saboteurs damaged rail infrastructure near the northern Italian city of Bologna on Saturday morning, disrupting train journeys on the first full day of the Winter Olympic Games, the Transport Ministry
summaryParagraphs: Saboteurs damaged rail infrastructure near the northern Italian city of Bologna on Saturday morning, disrupting train journeys on the first full day of the Winter Olympic Games, the Transport Ministry said. Police reported three separate incidents at different locations, which caused delays of up to 2-1/2 hours for high-speed, Intercity and regional services. The ministry called it an act of "serious sabotage", adding that it echoed the opening day of the 2024 Summer Olympic Games in Paris, when saboteurs struck France's high-speed TGV train network, causing travel chaos. "These actions of unprecedented seriousness do not in any way tarnish Italy's image in the world, an image that the Games will make even more compelling and positive," said the ministry, which is headed by Deputy Prime Minister Matteo Salvini. The state-owned railway Ferrovie dello Stato (FS) had to temporarily close its high-speed station in Bologna, but traffic was slowly returning to normal by Saturday afternoon, i For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: 'Khejri Bachao Andolan': Why Rajasthan is rallying to protect its 'Kalpavriksha'?
whyItMatters: A significant protest is under way in Rajasthan over the felling of the khejri tree. Communities are demanding stronger protection for the state tree, alleging that it is being cut to make way for sol
summaryParagraphs: A significant protest is under way in Rajasthan over the felling of the khejri tree. Communities are demanding stronger protection for the state tree, alleging that it is being cut to make way for solar power projects. Political leaders across parties have joined the movement, drawing attention to the tree’s cultural and ecological significance. In an arid landscape where survival is closely tied to ecology, the debate in western Rajasthan now extends beyond development to questions of history, identity and survival. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

items.headline: Elon Musk denies Starlink phone: CEO says no device in works
whyItMatters: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet busines
summaryParagraphs: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet business's expansion ahead of a potential IPO. Musk has previously expressed strong reluctance towards phone manufacturing. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
